title: Scented Candles Gifts for Women, Votive Candles Set of Fresh Linen, Vanilla, Jasmine, and Lemon, Soy Wax Candle Gift Set for Birthdays, Weddings, Christmas
features: FOUR FRAGRANCE: Includes fresh linen, vanilla, jasmine, and lemon. Jasmine create the feeling of a fresh bouquet of jasmine in your room. Fresh linen makes you feel refreshed leave your home feeling spotless. Vanilla is a sweet and warm scent. The scent of lemon is fresh and uplifting.

WISH HIDDEN IN THE CANDLE: The candle hides beautiful blessings within, and each time one is lit, it's a surprise. The sudden surprise isn't just the joy of receiving a gift; what matters most is being remembered and treated with care.
100% NATURAL SOY WAX: The scented candles are made of 100% soy wax with essential oil. It won't generate smoke, is harmless, and has no pollution, which are safe for the elderly and children.

DIMENSIONS & IDEAL GIFT: A greeting card and packaging make it perfect for gift giving. The wax net weight is 50g(1.76oz), Each candle burns for approximately 13 hours. Opening size: 5.5cm, bottom size: 5cm, height: 5.2cm.
100% SATISFACTION: Provides full refunds and returns if there are any problems after receiving the product. Just let us know and we will solve the issue and answer your concern at the soonest.
